nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Ambon white-eye
nodes.summary: Ambon white-eye（Ambon white-eye，学名 Zosterops kuehni），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia. They are found on the islands Ambon and Serman in Indonesia. Ambon white-eye birds are known for their distinctive coloring, including the white rings around the bird's eyes. The Ambon white-eye is near threatened due to habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Ambon white-eye is currently being considered as a near threat. The species is currently not globally endangered. The bird's habitat is slowly diminishing on Ambon island. This due to deforestation and loss of habitat. If destruction of the forest on the island continues, it could lead to population decline in the future
